case_title: QUAY SY VS. TAM VUONG QUY NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY SY, QUAY AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, TAM VUONG QUY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2011 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-27-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-27-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER LINH MUSFELT PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT'S FRIEND LINH QUACH, SWORN, AND INTERPRETS ENGLISH/VIETNAMESE - VIETNAMESE/ENGLISH ON HER BEHALF. CLERK; S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SY, QUAY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 ) SERVED JUN-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, TAM VUONG QUY

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF INTERPRETER PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT NGUYEN, TAM VUONG QUY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF INTERPRETER GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SY, QUAY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NGUYEN, TAM VUONG QUY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
